name: AI Focus Mode
description: Analyzes page content in real-time using on-device AI and hides distracting elements unrelated to your current work.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://huggingface.co https://*.huggingface.co https://*.hf.co https://cdn.jsdelivr.net
